nasb.text: Then on the fifteenth day of the same month there is the Feast of Unleavened Bread to the Lord; for seven days you shall eat unleavened bread.

esv.text: And on the fifteenth day of the same month is the Feast of Unleavened Bread to the Lord; for seven days you shall eat unleavened bread.

cnv.text: 這月十五日是耶和華的無酵節；你們要吃無酵餅七日。

ccb.text: 从一月十五日开始是耶和华的无酵节，一连七天你们必须吃无酵饼。
